title: Fix iPhone Safari typing performance lag

stories.title: Memoize StarsBackground to prevent re-render on keystroke
acceptanceCriteria: Typing in name input does NOT re-render 65 star SVG elements
Build passes with no TypeScript errors

stories.title: Extract countdown timer to prevent 1s interval full re-renders
acceptanceCriteria: Timer state and setInterval are in a separate React.memo component
Timer ticking does not trigger SajuApp re-render
Timer still displays correctly on loading screens

stories.title: Fix Safari backdrop-filter performance
acceptanceCriteria: backdrop-filter: blur() replaced with solid backgrounds on always-visible elements (.card, nav buttons)

stories.title: Fix render-time setState causing double renders
acceptanceCriteria: compatKey comparison moved from render body to useEffect
No setState calls during render phase

stories.title: Verify all fixes, test, build, deploy
